description: Converge the two halves of CodeScaleBench (SDLC with deterministic verifiers + Org with answer.json verifiers) into a single unified benchmark. Three phases: (1) add IR scoring to SDLC tasks via curator ground truth, (2) promote select Org tasks to SDLC categories with deterministic verifiers, (3) rebuild manifest optimized for multi-repo, large codebase, and task-type balance (comprehension/implementation/quality).
title: [Epic] Unify SDLC + Org into single balanced benchmark
